title: ethanium bracteosum
side_effects: Ethanium bracteosum can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing dizziness and disorientation due to an imbalance of neurotransmitters in the brain. Prolonged consumption of the plant's extracts can also lead to stomach ulcers, nausea, and diarrhea, making it essential to use it under medical supervision. Furthermore, improper use of the plant can cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes, itching, and swelling, in some individuals. In severe cases, excessive consumption of ethanium bracteosum can lead to respiratory failure and cardiac complications.
